creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad London’s hottest new restaurant opens this FRIDAY, 8th May, and it’s one of the most beautiful restaurants we’ve seen 🔥 This is @tigermilkuk Spitalfields where you’ll be transported to a Mexican hacienda 🇲🇽 complete with courtyard, terrace, fountain, a stunning bar and even a cosy library! The food is incredible, with a Latin American menu, including tacos, quesadillas, ceviche and grills 🌮 and don’t skip their delicious desserts!

Share this with someone who would love to go!
📍 The London, Fruit & Wool Exchange, Crispin St, London, E1 6AG

geo_locations: The London, Fruit & Wool Exchange, Crispin St, London, E1 6AG
pinned_places: The London, Fruit & Wool Exchange, Crispin St, London, E1 6AG

transcription.text: This massive new restaurant opens in London tomorrow and it's going right up there with one of the most beautiful restaurants we've seen. From the moment you walk in you will be transported to a Mexican hacienda with a stunning courtyard complete with terrace and fountain and then you walk into the heart with this amazing bar area. But that's not all because the next room has a floor-to-ceiling library. Say hello to Tiger Milk Spitalfields, their new London flagship. The food is always delicious. Think spicy, guacamole, tacos, quesadillas, ceviche, grills to share and also amazing drinks. And don't skip their desserts including the chocolate mousse. This place is going to be absolutely buzzing. Run before it gets too popular. Share this with someone who would love to go.
